final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: corporate ID badge mockup, front and back views
Primary request: realistic employee ID card for 字节期动 (ByteDance-style tech company), showing both front and back sides
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray studio surface with soft shadows
Subject: plastic employee badge with lanyard hole, photo placeholder, company logo area, name field, employee ID number, department info on front; magnetic stripe or QR code, terms of use, emergency contact on back
Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, corporate stationery
Composition/framing: top-down flat lay showing front card on left, back card on right, slight overlap or separated
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, professional and clean
Color palette: white card base, blue accent (tech corporate), black text, subtle gray details
Materials/textures: matte laminated PVC plastic, slight gloss on photo area, realistic lanyard fabric texture
Text (verbatim): "字节期动"
Constraints: must show both front and back sides clearly, realistic plastic card thickness and edge detail
Avoid: cartoon style, low-res textures, warped perspective, watermark
